title: Comply with industry quality assurance requirements
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Comply with industry quality assurance requirements demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Follow quality assurance practices

pcs.text: Identify elements of quality assurance (QA) applicable to industry sector
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify elements of quality assurance (QA) applicable to industry sector?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify elements of quality assurance (QA) applicable to industry sector.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify methods of control for each hazard.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete recordkeeping according to workplace requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow industry-based QA practices.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete internal QA checks according to workplace requirements.
